case: standard — fair price, solid trust, no side effects
project: a digital tax-collection overhaul
ask: Governor, {amount}M and I drag this city's books into the century. Back me and the treasury runs clean.

accept.msg: You funded the tax overhaul. (-{amount}M · +12 trust) The ledgers thank you.

decline.msg: You passed on the tax overhaul. (-3 trust) They stop bringing you the good ideas.

project: a state-of-the-art automated revenue center
ask: {amount}M builds a gleaming new revenue center, Governor. The public will see a modern, transparent city.

accept.msg: You built the revenue center. (-{amount}M · +18 trust · +5% approval) A monument to fiscal responsibility.

decline.msg: You denied the revenue center. (-6 trust) They wanted to show off, and you clipped their wings.

decline.msg: You denied the software update. (-1 trust) The spreadsheets crash. Again.

case: partisan — pushes a specific political agenda hard
project: funneling city money into a friendly PAC
ask: {amount}M for the 'Civic Improvement PAC', Governor. It's technically a non-profit. We'll use it for the campaign.

accept.scandalTitle: City Funds Funneled to Political Action Committee
accept.msg: You funded the PAC. (-{amount}M · +14 trust · -3% approval) The campaign is flush. The FBI is knocking.

decline.msg: You denied the PAC. (-6 trust · +2% approval) The campaign is broke. The law is satisfied.

case: compromise — very lean, minimal impact
project: a high-end espresso machine for the finance team
ask: Just {amount}M for an espresso machine, Governor. The finance team works late. They need good coffee to cook the books.

accept.scandalTitle: Finance Team Gets Lavish Espresso Machine
accept.msg: You bought the machine. (-{amount}M · +3 trust) The espresso is rich. The accounting is loose.

decline.msg: You denied the machine. (-1 trust) They drink instant. They plot.

case: high stakes — all-or-nothing massive investment
project: establishing a parallel, un-auditable shadow budget
ask: {amount}M to seed the shadow budget, Governor. A parallel ledger. No oversight, no audits. Total control.

accept.msg: You built the shadow budget. (-{amount}M · +22 trust · -5% approval) You own the money. You own the city. The risk is absolute.

decline.msg: You denied the shadow budget. (-12 trust · +3% approval) They call you a coward. The democracy holds.

case: standard — fair price, solid trust, no side effects
project: a priority project in their department
ask: Governor, {amount}M would let me actually deliver this year. Back my department and I'll back you.

accept.msg: You funded the project. (-{amount}M · +12 trust) They won't forget it.

decline.msg: You turned them down. (-3 trust) They take it personally.

case: prestige — massive overhaul, huge trust and public approval
project: a highly visible, award-winning departmental showcase
ask: {amount}M for the flagship showcase, Governor. It'll win national awards and make us look like geniuses.

accept.msg: You funded the showcase. (-{amount}M · +18 trust · +5% approval) The awards roll in. The department is ecstatic.

decline.msg: You denied the showcase. (-6 trust) They wanted glory. You gave them a pat on the back.

case: cheap quick win — small ask, modest trust
project: buying new staplers and paper for the office
ask: Just {amount}M for office supplies, Governor. The staplers are broken, and we're printing on the back of old memos.

accept.msg: You bought the supplies. (-{amount}M · +5 trust) The staplers click. A minor victory.

decline.msg: You denied the supplies. (-1 trust) They use tape. They resent you.

case: risky — funds it, but the contractors are questionable
project: onboarding a highly paid, unqualified consultant
ask: {amount}M for a new consultant, Governor. They're a genius. Also, they're my college roommate. Trust me.

accept.msg: You hired the consultant. (-{amount}M · +10 trust · -1% approval) They provide 'advice'. The press asks about their resume.

decline.msg: You denied the hire. (-3 trust · +1% approval) They are annoyed. The ethics board is relieved.

case: vanity — big ask, strong trust, but the public sees waste
project: funding a plaque and ceremony to rename the HQ
ask: {amount}M for the renaming ceremony and the bronze plaque, Governor. It'll be the 'Director Smith Building'.

accept.msg: You renamed the building. (-{amount}M · +14 trust · -2% approval) The plaque is shiny. The public thinks they're narcissistic.

decline.msg: You denied the plaque. (-4 trust · +1% approval) Their ego is bruised. The voters approve.

case: emergency — small, but refusing genuinely offends
project: emergency IT response to a critical server failure
ask: The servers are down, Governor. {amount}M for emergency IT contractors right now, or we lose the tax records.

accept.msg: You fixed the servers. (-{amount}M · +7 trust · +2% approval) The data is safe. The IT guys are heroes.

decline.msg: You denied the IT fix. (-10 trust) The servers melt. The tax records are gone. You are finished.

case: dubious — cheap, decent trust, but smells like embezzlement
project: sending the staff to a 'mandatory training' in a luxury resort
ask: {amount}M for the mandatory training seminar, Governor. It's in Bali. Strictly educational, I swear.

accept.scandalTitle: Staff Sent to Luxury Resort for 'Training'
accept.msg: You funded the seminar. (-{amount}M · +8 trust · -3% approval) They learn a lot about cocktails. The press is mocking you.

decline.msg: You denied the trip. (-4 trust · +2% approval) They stay at their desks. The taxpayers keep their money.

case: partisan — pushes a specific political agenda hard
project: a 'diversity' initiative that only hires from the governor's base
ask: {amount}M for the new hiring initiative, Governor. We'll only hire from the 5th district. Our people need jobs.

accept.msg: You funded the initiative. (-{amount}M · +13 trust · -2% approval) Your base is employed. The civil rights lawyers are drafting suits.

decline.msg: You denied the initiative. (-5 trust) Your base remains unemployed and angry.

case: compromise — very lean, minimal impact
project: repairing the air conditioning unit
ask: Just {amount}M to fix the AC, Governor. It's 90 degrees in the office. My team is sweating through their shirts.

accept.msg: You fixed the AC. (-{amount}M · +3 trust) The air is cool. The team can think again.

decline.msg: You denied the AC. (-2 trust) They sweat. They plot your downfall.

case: high stakes — all-or-nothing massive investment
project: a massive, disruptive departmental reorganization
ask: {amount}M to restructure the department, Governor. We'll fire the dead weight and double the budget for the rest. It'll be brutal, but effective.

accept.msg: You restructured the department. (-{amount}M · +22 trust · -4% approval) The dead weight is gone. The survivors are terrified but loyal.

decline.msg: You denied the restructuring. (-10 trust) The dead weight stays. The department rots from the inside.
